__faion_header__.purpose: Minimum viable exploratory-charter artefact for validator smoke-test.

charter.mission: Explore the new email-onboarding flow to discover failure modes in internationalisation, timezone handling, and email rendering.

observation_log.text: try unicode emoji in name field
ZWJ emoji accepted but rendered as raw bytes in welcome email
filed BUG-2118: ZWJ emoji not rendered
does this affect support tickets too?

key_findings: i18n bugs cluster in email-rendering layer, not input layer
API sanitiser is weaker than UI sanitiser
Timezone display is correct but datetime format inconsistent
follow_up_questions: does support-ticket rendering share the email pipeline?
